name: CrossUserDataset (D1–D3): In-the-Wild Multimodal Affective Sensing Dataset
description: A three-wave longitudinal in-the-wild smartphone and wearable sensing dataset for moment-level affective state modeling. Collected annually from 2020 to 2022 on a university-student cohort in South Korea, the dataset pairs passive sensor data from participants' own Android smartphones and Fitbit wearables with dense in-situ self-reported affective labels collected via the Experience Sampling Method (ESM). Three waves (D1, D2, D3) share a core label space of valence, arousal, stress, and task disturbance. D3 additionally includes PANAS-style affective word intensity labels. Planned for Harvard Dataverse with gated access; final license and Data Use Agreement are TBD on acceptance/public release. Preprocessing follows the reproducible pipeline of Zhang et al. (2024), DOI: 10.1145/3678578. Accompanied by a three-tier benchmark (personal-history predictability, within-wave cross-user transfer, cross-wave transfer).
citation: TBD-on-acceptance: Full paper citation (NeurIPS Datasets and Benchmarks Track).
measurementTechnique: Experience Sampling Method (ESM); passive smartphone sensing; Fitbit wearable sensing
rai:dataCollection: Participants were university students recruited via campus bulletin boards in South Korea. They installed the ABC Logger Android application, which collected passive sensor data and delivered ESM prompts during waking hours (10 AM–10 PM). Wearables (Fitbit Inspire HR across all waves; Polar H10 for D1/D2 sub-period subgroups) were worn throughout the ~30-day collection period per wave. All procedures were approved by the IRB at [TBD-on-acceptance: institution], approval number [TBD-on-acceptance: IRB number]. Dataset planned for Harvard Dataverse ([TBD-on-acceptance: Dataverse URL]) with gated access; final license and Data Use Agreement are TBD.
rai:dataCollectionType: Active (ESM self-report) and passive (smartphone + wearable sensor streams)
rai:dataPreprocessingProtocol: Preprocessing follows the reproducible 8-stage mobile-sensing pipeline of Zhang et al. (2024), DOI: 10.1145/3678578. Stages include: ESM QC (expired-prompt and >10-min late-response removal; participant-level filters of wearable coverage >= 50%, smartphone coverage >= 50%, ESM response rate >= 30%), feature extraction across current / 15-min / 30-min / yesterday-epoch / today-epoch windows, feature preparation (one-hot encoding, PIF# participant-info attachment), feature normalization fit on train only, data splitting (per tier), resampling (train-only), model training with Optuna HPO (30 trials, validation-AUROC selection), and evaluation. Cross-wave transfer (Tier C) additionally applies alias unification of categorical vocabularies (CALL_CNT, BAT_PLG, WLS, Notification_CAT) and common-feature intersection. Privacy transformations applied before release: GPS longitude offset by a per-participant random constant, contact numbers MD5-hashed, Bluetooth/Wi-Fi MAC addresses UUID-replaced.
rai:annotationsPerItem: Each ESM instance carries 4 shared labels in all waves (Valence, Arousal, Stress, Task Disturbance) plus wave-specific labels: D1 adds Attention / Mental / Duration / Change; D2 adds Attention / Mental / Duration / ValenceChange / ArousalChange; D3 adds the 8 PANAS-style affect-word labels (Happy, Relaxed, Cheerful, Content, Sad, Anxious, Depressed, Angry). Labels are self-reported by the participant at the time of the ESM prompt.
rai:personalSensitiveInformation: Dataset contains passively sensed behavioural data (location, app usage, communication metadata) from real individuals, collected under IRB approval and written informed consent. Anonymisation applied; see DATASHEET.md Section 2 and docs/ethics.md.

distribution.name: D1 dataset archive
distribution.description: Complete data archive for wave D1 (Feb 7 – Apr 2, 2020; 92 participants after QC; 10,259 ESM responses). Requires Harvard Dataverse account and agreement to the Data Use Agreement before download.
distribution.contentUrl: TBD-on-acceptance: Harvard Dataverse file URL for D1

distribution.name: D2 dataset archive
distribution.description: Complete data archive for wave D2 (Dec 7, 2020 – Jan 27, 2021; 99 participants after QC; 21,042 ESM responses). Requires Harvard Dataverse account and agreement to the Data Use Agreement before download.
distribution.contentUrl: TBD-on-acceptance: Harvard Dataverse file URL for D2

distribution.name: D3 dataset archive
distribution.description: Complete data archive for wave D3 (Nov 23, 2021 – Jan 11, 2022; 106 participants after QC; 21,838 ESM responses). Requires Harvard Dataverse account and agreement to the Data Use Agreement before download.
distribution.contentUrl: TBD-on-acceptance: Harvard Dataverse file URL for D3

recordSet.name: ESM Responses
recordSet.description: In-situ self-reported affective state labels, one row per ESM response per participant. Available for all three waves.

field.name: Pcode
field.description: Anonymized participant identifier

field.name: TriggerTime
field.description: Unix timestamp (milliseconds, UTC) when the ESM prompt was delivered

field.name: ResponseTime
field.description: Unix timestamp (milliseconds, UTC) when the participant submitted the response

field.name: Valence
field.description: Self-reported valence on a 7-point scale (−3=very negative to +3=very positive). Available in D1, D2, D3.

field.name: Arousal
field.description: Self-reported arousal on a 7-point scale (−3=very calm to +3=very activated). Available in D1, D2, D3.

field.name: Stress
field.description: Self-reported stress. Scale −3 to +3 in D1 and D2; scale 0 to +6 in D3.

field.name: Disturbance
field.description: Self-reported task disturbance. Scale −3 to +3 in D1 and D2; scale 0 to +6 in D3.

field.name: Happy
field.description: PANAS-style affect word: Happy. D3 only, scale 0 to +6.

field.name: Relaxed
field.description: PANAS-style affect word: Relaxed. D3 only, scale 0 to +6.

field.name: Cheerful
field.description: PANAS-style affect word: Cheerful. D3 only, scale 0 to +6.

field.name: Content
field.description: PANAS-style affect word: Content. D3 only, scale 0 to +6.

field.name: Sad
field.description: PANAS-style affect word: Sad. D3 only, scale 0 to +6.

field.name: Anxious
field.description: PANAS-style affect word: Anxious. D3 only, scale 0 to +6.

field.name: Depressed
field.description: PANAS-style affect word: Depressed. D3 only, scale 0 to +6.

field.name: Angry
field.description: PANAS-style affect word: Angry. D3 only, scale 0 to +6.

field.name: Attention
field.description: Self-reported attention. Scale -3 to +3. D1 and D2 only.

field.name: Mental
field.description: Self-reported mental load / cognitive demand. Scale -3 to +3. D1 and D2 only.

field.name: Duration
field.description: Self-reported duration of the current affective state. D1 and D2 only.

field.name: Change
field.description: Self-reported affective change since the previous ESM prompt. Scale -3 to +3. D1 only.

field.name: ValenceChange
field.description: Self-reported change in valence since the previous ESM prompt. Scale -3 to +3. D2 only.

field.name: ArousalChange
field.description: Self-reported change in arousal since the previous ESM prompt. Scale -3 to +3. D2 only.

recordSet.name: User Information
recordSet.description: Participant-level demographic and psychological trait measures, collected once per wave.

field.name: Pcode
field.description: Anonymized participant identifier

field.name: Age
field.description: Participant age in years

field.name: Gender
field.description: Participant gender (M/F)

field.name: BFI
field.description: Big Five Inventory short form (K-BFI-15): Openness, Conscientiousness, Extraversion, Agreeableness, Neuroticism

field.name: PSS
field.description: Perceived Stress Scale (PSS-10) total score

field.name: GHQ
field.description: General Health Questionnaire (GHQ-12) total score

field.name: PHQ
field.description: Patient Health Questionnaire (PHQ-9) depression score. Available in D1 and D2 only.

recordSet.name: Fitbit Heart Rate
recordSet.description: Continuous wrist-based heart rate from Fitbit Inspire HR, sampled at 1 Hz. Available for all three waves.

field.name: Pcode
field.description: Anonymized participant identifier

field.name: timestamp
field.description: Unix timestamp (milliseconds, UTC)

field.name: value
field.description: Heart rate in beats per minute (BPM)
